examples: At every stage, clockmakers led the way to accuracy and precision; they became masters of miniaturization, detectors and correctors of error, searchers for new and better.
Laser fuze circuit miniaturization is the key to laser fuze technique.
The "Brilliant Pebbles" concept is a good example of weapon miniaturization.
The improved structure is based on perpendicular magnetization3 and takes element miniaturization to below 30nm.
Of probably even greater significance is the rapid progress of miniaturization in video surveillance.
